channel.title: Lethal Company Guides — Moon Strategies, Monster Bestiary & Co-op Tips on DungeonPath — Free Game Guides & Walkthroughs
channel.description: Recent content in Lethal Company Guides — Moon Strategies, Monster Bestiary & Co-op Tips on DungeonPath — Free Game Guides & Walkthroughs

item.title: Lethal Company Advanced Strategies Guide: Late-Game, Quota Scaling, and Max-Efficiency (2026)
item.description: Master late-game Lethal Company with advanced strategies. Learn quota scaling math, weather tactics, max-efficiency loot routes, and more.

item.title: Lethal Company Beginner Guide: Survive Your First Quota (2026)
item.description: New to Lethal Company? This beginner guide covers the core game loop, first quota tutorial, essential survival tips, and common mistakes to avoid.

item.title: Lethal Company Co-op Team Roles Guide: Optimal 4-Player Team Composition (2026)
item.description: Learn optimal 4-player team composition in Lethal Company. Ship Operator, Scout, Hauler, and Support roles with communication protocols.

item.title: Lethal Company Equipment Guide: Best Items, Costs, and Loadouts (2026)
item.description: Complete equipment guide for Lethal Company with real item costs, best early purchases, team loadout strategies, and which items are traps.

item.title: Lethal Company Monster Bestiary: Every Entity Explained (2026)
item.description: Complete monster bestiary for Lethal Company with all 12+ entities. Learn behaviors, counter-strategies, danger levels, and detection methods.

item.title: Lethal Company Moons Guide: Complete Moon Rankings and Strategies (2026)
item.description: Every moon in Lethal Company ranked by difficulty with loot values, monster spawns, travel costs, weather effects, and profit strategies.

item.title: Lethal Company Scrap and Loot Guide: Complete Item Database (2026)
item.description: Complete scrap and loot database for Lethal Company with every item, value ranges, weight classes, and value rankings to maximize profits.

item.title: Lethal Company Terminal Commands Guide: Complete Reference (2026)
item.description: Complete terminal command reference for Lethal Company. Every command including moons, store, bestiary, scan, switch, ping, and hidden commands.
